entry.title: Fieldglass multi-segments idocs in S4
entry.content: In Fieldglass we can have multiple line items for a SOW that get sent to SAP S4 in one IDOC with multiple segments. Lets say two of the line items/segments in the idoc successfully post the SES but the 3rd ended in error in the idoc for whatever reason. We cannot reprocess the idoc because 2 of the 3 line items have already posted successfully and we dont want duplicate postings. SAP support is suggest we cannot reprocess the one segment and will need to cancel the SES and invoice for all and then start over. This is not acceptable to the business and we're hoping if anyone had similar issues with a different workaround?

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Public Cloud - BTP learning journey
entry.content: Thank you so much @Margit_Wagner, I greatly appreciate it.

entry.title: Re: How to convert draft documents to formal documents af...
entry.content:
Hi ZHD,

You need to use SaveDraftToDocument() method to convert the draft to valid document.

Hope it helps!

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Analytical queries in BTP ABAP
entry.content:
Hi,

I was following this tutorial (https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-analytics.html#09b1b1c4-4a63-4fbb-8a54-e08f591) and I am getting some errors whenever I try to do the preview part.

I am getting this error below: 

Also, I noticed the tutorial only talked about SAP SAC. Can we use this service in an Analytical List page in SAP BAS? There are actually quite few constraints.

I noticed that we cannot expose the analytical query into oData v2/v4 UI. We can only expose it via the InA UI protocol. In SAP BAS, I can only find oData v2/v4 services under this dropdown.

Is it safe to assume that InA UI binding can only be used for integrating to SAP SAC?

entry.title: Consume Calculation View in SAC from CAP project not working
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) project in my BTP environment (trial), and I am trying to consume a calculated view from SAP Analytics Cloud (trial), I have created a connection and then when I try to select a data source in the modeler, the list is empty.

To create the CAP project I followed the following tutorials:

Create an SAP Cloud Application Programming Model Project for SAP HANA Cloud
https://youtu.be/8obCwGEx1-Q?si=ll6fWgvEqPluQa8i
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-create-project.html

SAP Tech Bytes: CAP/HANA Tutorial Part 2 - Create Database Artifacts Using Core Data Services (CDS)
https://youtu.be/uS_vT-gHYMo?si=C4W1q7I6CLfHErHP
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-create-database-cds.html

SAP Tech Bytes: CAP/HANA Tutorial Part 3 - Create a User Interface
https://youtu.be/6WY70LyLS1c?si=X0XuCNEtDW2o6sRe
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-create-ui.html

SAP Tech Bytes: CAP/HANA Tutorial Part 4 - Add User Authentication
https://youtu.be/anvKQP8yOr4?si=rDy5ndYbe__6ZwHp
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-add-authentication.html

SAP Tech Bytes: CAP/HANA Tutorial Part 5 - Create Calculation View and Expose via CAP
https://youtu.be/zKsx91qicwU?si=xC4rZUGZrGFI7mxE
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-calc-view.html

Everything works fine, at the end of part 5 I verified that the view was created correctly (see images 1) and the service exposes the data correctly. After that I tried to consume the calculated view from SAC, following the tutorial Develop Calculation View in BAS and consume in SAC (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/develop-calculation-view-in-bas-and-consume-in-sac/ba-p/13509188), starting from step 8. I created a connection, and then I tried to create a model but when I select the data source, it doesn't show anything (see image 2).


image 1

image 2

What can I be doing wrong?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Data analysis in relatation to BSID and BSAD
entry.content:
Hi Tammy,

thank you for your response. 

I'm still working on S3 so would have to go with the BSEG table. Using this table I can ignore the BSID and BSAD table right?

I intend to use BKPF and BSEG and combine them to have all informations required. I understood that the unique identfier of a document in BKPF and BSEG is a composite key of the fields [MANDT], [BUKRS], [GJARH] & [BELNR]. Via this key I intend joining the the 2 tables. 

It is still not clear to me how I can intentify clearing items in BSEG. The field [AUGBL] seems to contain the [BELNR] of the clearing item, but the [BELNR] is again not unique in BSEG. I find multiple items if I search for the clearing item with only the [BELNR] which is provided in the [AUGBL] field. Would a composite key of [AUGBL] and [AUGDT] be a unique identifier?

If not how can I identify clearing items of individual items in BSEG?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Project Budget control in balance sheet account for a...
entry.content:
did you create the distribution rules as described here?

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/67e323b7117e4c91869c258933f47182/463fde531ed3424de10000000a174cb4.html

entry.title: Why do Story Reports disappear from report center then reappear periodically?
entry.content:
Hello, I am experiencing an issue with Story Reports that disappear and then reappear randomly.  My co-worker and I have created a number of story reports and they are shared with other users throughout the organization. Periodically, when attempting to view or access a story report I notice that all the story reports in report center are missing. When I search for a specific story by name or sort report center to only show report type Story, it returns stating there are not reports. Typically I have to wait and eventually the reports will show up again. I have tried to reproduce the issue intentionally without success. I have also tried a number of steps to resolve the issue when it does occur, again with out success. 

Is any one else experiencing this issue and did you find any resolutions or workarounds?

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 2
entry.content: Not a python expert. So, used the swagger UI to extract the same json result output of the recipe document already loaded in week 1 to the default client. Tried from curl as well.

entry.title: Courses with an online pre-req that needs to be completed within 30 days of the course
entry.content:
We have several courses (in person) that require an online training to be completed within 30 days of attending the class. Obviously we can set the online item as a prerequisite but this does not account for the 30 day window.

We tried to use a duration based program and a forced order where the online has to be done first but the program overrides the pre-req and users are allowed to register for the course as long as they are enrolled in the program.

Has anyone else experienced this or does anyone have any suggestions on how we can handle this situation?

Thank you!

entry.title: Use of Cost Center Tariffs in cprojects Costing
entry.content:
Dear PPM community,

we are using cprojects with task-based controlling and manual multilevel account assignment (WBS elements). Cprojects and SAP PS/CO run on two different systems.

Our requirement is to use role-specific cost rates in cprojects:
Role "Project Manager" gets cost rate "Project Manager".
Role "Engineer" gets cost rate "Engineer".

Further, each role should be assigned to exactly one cost center from SAP CO:
Role "Project Manager" is assigned to cost center "Project Management".
Role "Engineer" is assigned to cost center "Engineering".
The relationship role to cost center is 1:1.

Costing in cprojects should make use of CO cost center tariffs maintained in KP26. We want to avoid double maintenance of (actual) hourly rates in KP26 and (plan) hourly rates in PPM customizing. Actual and plan hourly rates are identical.

When transferring calculated costs to SAP PS, the cost center information from the assigned roles should be transferred to CO planning tables.

My questions are:

  1. How to derive cost center from role? Am I correct to implement BAdIs DPR_FIN_GECCO_ATTR (in cprojects system) and IAOM_ATTRIBUTES (ATTRIBUTES_CPROJECTS) in S/4HANA system?
  2. How to make use of KP26 cost center tariffs instead of maintaining PPM-specific cost rates? As per SAP Help Portal, it is possible to use "Plan price for the role in cost center accounting" to calculate costs for roles: Costing Logic | SAP Help Portal But how is it done?
  3. How can we maintain the role-specific cost rates in a project template? Manual effort for operative project creation should be minimized.

Thank you so much for your input.
Best regards

entry.title: Manage Customer Consignment pick up with Advance Returns
entry.content:
Hi All,

SAP uses the advance returns process that provides multiple follow on integrations for an end to end returns management solution.

Can we use the returns process to also manage customer consignment pick up ? It does not seem to be possible to use advance returns for consignment pick up, but would like to get a feedback from the esteemed members if this is possible with adding consignment pick up to the advance returns process. 

Appreciate your feedback.

entry.title: Re: Deconsolidation
entry.content:
Hello Pavan,

There could be multiple ways to handle this. One thing coming to mind as of now is to use Max P and Max D values. In configuration 'Define Attributes for Deconsolidation' use Max P and Max D=2. This is with a common understanding the number of Products in a HU>=2, Deconsolidation Process will be activated. Having said that, you also have to activate Rule based Deconsolidation in POSC set up.

POSC set up. In below example, it is assumed HU coming from vendors will have common HU type group even if they send 2 Products in 1 Pallet( HU) or send them individually. Hu type group is same.

To get the Decon Bin determination, configure below.

You can then enter either a work center of type Deconsolidation Station, or directly enter a storage type, storage section, and storage bin. If you enter a work center, EWM finds the storage bin that is assigned to this work center.

Now do a quick test.

1) When 2 products are coming in a single HU.

The HU ending with 71 is diverted to Deconsolidation station because Maximum number of Decon HU MAX D=2.

2) Now Pack 2 Products into 2 different Hus, expectation is Vendor is sending 2 different Products into 2 different HU.

 

In below screen shot, system is directly moving the 2 different Hus directly to Final bin because Max D<2 and hence Decon step was skipped.

However, Max D and Max P calculation will fail if product is batch managed and vendor is sending multiple batches of same product into 1 Hu. In that case, even if you maintain Max D and Max P=2, and HU contains 1 Product but more than 2 batches, Decon step will be activated.

Its worth to check advanced feature of Deconsolidation released by SAP for customers using Decon with Hu type check w/o Packspec.

3287757 - putaway destination bin determination in deconsolidation process without PackSpec

 

br

Shailesh Mishra

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services
entry.content: Last but not least 🙂 sorry for the delay! I'm a little bit disillusioned with the results. I tried first for Thermomix book without any results. I've thinked the maybe the engine with spanish couldn't be as much accurated as in english. So I look for a book with recipes in internet. Uploaded in a new schema 4 of them and putting them in a template and the unique improvement that I've seen is that from the second template they learnt the allergens. I'm pretty much sure that with more convencional formats will improve the result a lot.  But maybe I expected a little bit more

Until then, what is the best way new Spanish clients of SAP can make sure that their SF implementation is compliant with Spanish legislation?

entry.title: Re: sapjco3: How to add certificate for SNC connection
entry.content: Thank you again, following 2642538 worked

entry.title: Re: Strategy profile assignment
entry.content:
Hello rahulakshay

The strategy profile maintenance is done at transaction /SPRO (customizing).

Then the menu expansion depends on the SAP product version. But usually this is the path:

Click in the 'clock' button to run it, then you can create new entries or copy existing ones.

When working with user-specific profiles, you enter a Customizing ID in the profile maintenance. If you are working with general profiles, you leave this empty.

If you want to perform scheduling using your own user-specific settings, you should create profiles with your user name in profile maintenance as a Customizing ID. (The user name is the name with which you log on to the system).

The system automatically uses the user-specific profiles - if they exist - in the product planning board and order view (otherwise, it uses the general profiles). You can specify any profiles you want if you call up the detailed scheduling planning board directly.

This is described in the F1 help from the system.

 

Best regards

Yasmin

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Strategy profile
entry.content:
Hello rahulakshay

The strategy profile maintenance is done at transaction /SPRO (customizing).

Then the menu expansion depends on the SAP product version. But usually this is the path:

 

Click in the 'clock' button to run it, then you can create new entries or copy existing ones.

When working with user-specific profiles, you enter a Customizing ID in the profile maintenance. If you are working with general profiles, you leave this empty.

If you want to perform scheduling using your own user-specific settings, you should create profiles with your user name in profile maintenance as a Customizing ID. (The user name is the name with which you log on to the system).

The system automatically uses the user-specific profiles - if they exist - in the product planning board and order view (otherwise, it uses the general profiles). You can specify any profiles you want if you call up the detailed scheduling planning board directly.

This is described in the F1 help from the system.

 

Best regards

Yasmin

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: sap mdk object table getSelectedItems binding is comi...
entry.content:
For an Object Table in multi-select mode you can get the reference to the section and call getSelectedItems() to get the list of the selected items.  The you can iterate over the list of selected items and perform your action.

 

var selectedItems = '';
let productListSection = context.getPageProxy().getControl('SectionedTable').getSection('ProductList');
let items = productListSection.getSelectedItems();
items.forEach(item => {
    selectedItems += item.binding.Name + '\n'; 
});

 

Calling getSelectionChangedItem() will only return the last item that was changed either selected or unselected and not the whole list.  Typically this is used when you have a rule associated to the Object Table OnSelectionModeChanged event which is triggered when a item selection state is changed and will return the item that was changed.

entry.title: How to extend CNSETTLRULE to include COPA Fields?
entry.content:
CNSETTLERULE report doesn't have COPA characteristics fields. How to extend CNSETTLERULE report to display the below listed fields:

Table: CE4GM00_ACCT / CE4GM00

Unit of Measure
Trading Partner
Sold-to Country
Producing Plant
Product Type
Product Line
Other
Sales Program
Country of Origin


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to extend CNSETTLRULE to include COPA Fields?
entry.content:
CNSETTLERULE does not contain COPA fields in standard hence your requirement to extend the output of the report CNSETTLRULE would require a modification.

The SAP standard method for extending the PS Information system to include additional fields is described in SAP Note  43493 - Project information system: New fields in structures.

SAP Support does not support modifications - you will need to discuss your requirement with your consulting team since the responsibility of the usage of these modifications lie on the customer-side.

More information can be found in SAP Note 170183 - What to consider when applying modifications.

entry.title: Release annoucement of our improved SAP Service Cloud learning journey
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Happy to inform you that we have improvised the design and updated the content based on our learner's feedback on our learning journey Implementing SAP Service Cloud.

This learning journey will also assist with your certification exam. 

Please note: We have not yet linked the SAP Service Cloud Certification  link on this learning journey but that is on our roadmap. However, you can still take this learning journey free of cost and then pay for the certification if you decide to take it.

Certification can be separately accessed from here: SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP Service Cloud 

Hope you enjoy our new and improved learning journey. We always welcome and value your feedback on all  our courses and will appreciate if you can do so for this one too.

Happy learning!

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 2
entry.content: this time the result is perfect!

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Thank you Bernd. Yes it is good to know that SAP is working on MTO for Advanced ICo Sales.

I am also concerned about the restriction for Advanced Intercompany Stock transfer that "Intercompany purchase order items with account assignment (account assignment category is filled)" is not supported. Do you have any idea when that will be supported?

We have a requirement that Stock be moved to a regional warehouse for a project i.e. into Q stock. Currently this works via 1P9 but not via 5HP.

While we want to use the Advanced Intercompany scenarios because of the event based revenue recognition, there are so many restrictions that it is becoming a roadblock.
FYI - We are on S/4 HANA Cloud 2402

Regards

Jayshree

entry.title: Re: Producer crashed while generating compound doc - Erro...
entry.content:
Hi,

Does it fail at the same point, i.e. is it the same Book Page or Simulation causing the failure?  If it is, check the content in that object, is there anything special in that content object, e.g. a very high resolution image?

To try to troubleshoot the issue:

1. Open Producer
2. Select View > Javascript Console
3. Right click the console window and clear it
4. Start the compound document generation running

Is there an error in the Javascript window that helps with the issue?  If not, I would raise a support ticket using the Component ID KM-SEN-PRO so support can take a closer look.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: SAP Subscription Billing Onboarding Essentials
entry.content:
We are trying to make sure SAP Subscription Billing communicates with S/4 HANA Cloud system. In order to replicate Customer, Product ( Master data) to S/4 , We are working and activating Initial event mesh structure, It suggests to configure series of other communication structure reference =0892. It is asking for Subscription to event broker application.
Our Ultimate goal is 4GT and 1NN scope item needs to be working end to end as our end goal is to create Subscriptions for Subscription Item and collective invoice in S/4 HANA Cloud system FI-CA

Is Subscription to event broker Mandatory to go this route ?
If successful for the above step, Is there anything else customer need to buy as far as additional licenses are concerned ?

Thank you for your answer in advance.
Subbu Padmanabh

entry.content: How did you solve this?

entry.title: SAP Event Mesh - Maintain source for outbound bindings
entry.content:
Hello!

First of all, I want to apologize if this question has been answered already. I am still trying to find my way around this new site, and I have not seen any reference to it.

We have copied down our Prod environment to test. I have redone all the configuration for event mesh, and this is what my outbound message looks like:

{

"type":"sap.s4.beh.product.v1.Product.Changed.v1",

"specversion":"1.0",

"source":"/default/sap.s4.beh/PROD",

"id":"0675e911-ee96-1eef-83ae-bd428725c8db",

"time":"2024-05-08T20:02:36Z",

"datacontenttype":"application/json",

"data":{"Product":"RANDOMMATERIAL"}

}

My question is, where do I go to update the source? I needs to reflect that is coming from test and not from production.

 

Thanks so much in advance!

entry.title: Re: Serialize Files Transfer with SFTP Adapter in CPI using General splitter & Poll Enrich
entry.content: Worked perfectly. Great solution.

entry.title: Re: Anniversary Tile for Managers
entry.content:
Hello,

Main KBA for Birthday and Anniversary cards in SuccessFactors is 3116231 - Birthday and Work Anniversary Cards on the Latest Home Page - 2H 2021 - SAP for Me, where you can find all details related to the cards and how it works.

Additionally, the following KBA also explains all prerequisites to be met in order to have it working completely and avoid any error within the cards: 3152871 - Prerequisites for showing birthday and work anniversary cards in latest Homepage - SAP for Me 

Once all prerequisites are met and correctly set, you should have no issues with it. 

I hope it helps 😊

entry.title: Re: Missing Root Group Folder - Unsorted Issues
entry.content:
Hi Lauren,

I would do as Dirk mentions and try and restore the folder from the Trash.  If you cannot, you can tag a new folder as the 'root' group folder.  To do that:

1. Create the new folder that is to act as the root group folder - you need the folder in Producer so you can create it there if you like
2. In Producer, right click the folder, that is to be the new root group folder, and select Group Options > Set Root
3. Synchronize the changes back to Manager

If you are still having issues with content going into the Unsorted Folder, just make sure that authors are not retaining the editing control of individual folders.  When they finish editing an option, they should return editing control, including editing control of any folders that they have editing control over.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Training about SAP
entry.content:
Start with this course available on SAP Learning: Boost Your Career with SAP Skills | SAP Learning.

Additionally, it's good to get enabled on the Intelligent Enterprise: Discovering End-to-End Business Processes for the Intelligent Enterprise | SAP Learning.

I also recommend checking out the customer-facing onboarding resources: Onboarding Resource Center.

entry.title: Re: Unlock the full potential of your enterprise data with SAP Datasphere Catalog

Please check out this blog for more info: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-datasphere-catalog-harvesting-from-sap-datasphere-sap-bw-bridge/ba-p/13694333. Thanks.

If different layout, assuming it's the same rpt, compare default printers across the 2 machines.

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content:
Hi there,

Not directly related to the new SF Teams app in Teams App Store but just wondering if anyone has got the user mapping working in Work Tech Configure?

I managed to establish the connection between SF and our AD Azure but whenever I tried to run the user mapping, I get the error below. We have triple checked and our username in SF is identical to onPremisesSamAccountName in AD Azure and have given all the permissions described in the help guide.

I have raised a ticket with SAP, Microsoft 365 and AD Azure and no far no one can tell me why this is happening....

Thanks

entry.title: Connecting to an SAP Analytics Cloud tenant to SAP Datasphere Catalog
entry.content:
Hello experts!

We are trying to connect our SAP Analytics Cloud Tenant with our SAP Datasphere Catalog. But we ran into an error that we can't really understand.

We are following the steps detailed here: Connecting to Data Sources | SAP Help Portal under SAP Analytics Cloud Tenant Connection to create a new System.

Once we push the "+" icon to create a new system we fill the boxes with the following information: 

  • System Type: SAP Analytics Cloud
  • Name: SAP Analytics Cloud 
  • UUID of our SAC Tenant

And as an Authenticated System User, I am assuming that the authenticated system user is the user with whom I am making the connection with, and that would be my user (the one I am logged on in Datasphere) while our shared mailbox generic user is getting configured to use.

But when we click the buttom "Authenticate Now" we run into the following error:

Failed to (getAuthorizationAddress) due to an error: {"status":404,"code":"com.sap.orca.starter.core.exception.NotFoundException","message":"No resource com.sap.orca.svc.tenantmanagement.model.TmsTenant exists with uuid [our sac UUID]"} 

We looked for similar errors and we found this one here: 3338522 - Connecting SAC as Data Source for Catalog fails due Error "The UUID couldn't be verified" (sap.com). But it is not quite the same error we are encountering. So we are looking for other alternatives. (Our tenants' landscapes are in different countries but within the same continent)

  • Can you help us identify what could be causing that type of error?
  • Are we missing some configuration from SAC's side?

I am adding the error pictures here:

Thanks in advance!

Rebeca

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: SAC Story: How to derive a dimension value from the property of an another dimension
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

We have an SAC Story requirement where the data would be input on Location, Material, Date, Version, Amount (Measure) of a measure based planning model. It also has Account type dimension, but it's value should be derived automatically from Material's property, which is an account.

So, Materials: M1, M2, M3 has property called Account with values: A1, A2 and A3 respectively. 

Locations are L1, L2

Dates are preiods: From 202501 to 202512

Version: public.Budget

Measure: Amount

Planning Story would be like this:

            Version: Budget

            Measure: Amount

            Date   202501   202502     .... 202503

L1   M1         100           

       M2         200

       M3         300

L2   M1        150

       M2        250

       M3        350

 

Once saved, we would like to have the following in the database (model data) with Account valued derived from the Material's property: Account

Version  Location  Material  Account   Date      Amount

Budget   L1           M1           A1          202501  100

Budget   L1           M2           A2          202501  200

....

Budget   L2           M1           A1          202501  150

Budget   L2           M2           A2          202502  250

.....

Thanks,

SP

entry.title: route message from SAP PI to SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Hope you are doing well. 

i have requirement as from SAP outbound proxy is triggering and that interface name is same where same interface should trigger to SAP PI and SAP CPI based on the content condition from SAP.

which means in the content of the proxy sysname is coming where if sysname is "x" it should route to PI system, if sysname is "Y" it should route to SAP CPI. since same interface we are using i am unable to add it in sxmb_adm . can you please provide the options if any ?

 

Thanks & Regards

Madhu T

entry.title: Re: Billing document is missing(VBRK,VBRP), but have acco...
entry.content:
Thanks for your reply.

That accounting document don't have any sales data in VBRK & VBRP so can't find any of  sales order flow.

however according to our creation rule of sales order, I can find a order as below

but there is another one billing doc

When I asked the operator, he said when running VF04 the first attempt was failed without any error return message, but instead got the accounting doc : 900224412（no billing doc) so he running again and got accouting/billing doc : 900224444.

entry.title: Re: Billing document is missing(VBRK,VBRP), but have acco...
entry.content: Thanks for your reply.

entry.title: Re: Missing Root Group Folder - Unsorted Issues
entry.content:
@laurenfisher404Yes, that would probably be the best course of action. You can probably check to confirm that this one was originally called "root group" by going to Versions/Tags in Manager, and Show Version 1. Then, like I say, go see who changed it and castigate them severely!

Note that root doesn't need to actually be named "root" but I find it is easier for people to understand what it is if you leave it called that (especially when you initialize Producer and get the message about checking out "server root").

entry.title: CRM WEB UI - Custom Date Field - search date range like Create on field
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a date custom field in my Normal change document. and we enabled this custom field in search and search result in my CRM WEb UI screen.  Right now this custom date field we can search only one date. 

We want to extend this field can search date range between two dates or is earlier than .....same like standard date field(Create On).   Need your suggestions in achieving this functionality.

 

Thanks,

Rag

entry.title: Connectivity guaranteed with Cloud Integration version and Cloud Connector version
entry.content: Is there any reference where I can check connectivity guaranteed between BTP Cloud Integration version and Cloud Connector version?

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content: @AylwinJerome Documents uploading is not supported today. Please test out the functionality using your Test SF instance together with a Test Teams tenant if possible. You can specify who has access to the App via Teams configuration in Azure/Manage Apps. Please reach out to a Teams Administrator for this. The new App supports all functionalities of the old app and has more add to it. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/3adee415c1eb4b918bc0172afc76948c/87e6bd834acd4474bb7adf1227aff3e7.html

entry.title: Re: New SAP SuccessFactors App in the Microsoft Teams App Store and Deprecation of Legacy App Packag
entry.content: @Ethan_Dai what is the case number?

entry.title: #CoE#JMTHY删除销售订单权限控制
entry.content: 用户想要在删除销售订单是加控制，要求要判断当前用户不能删除，想问下从哪里能获取当前用户的值或者字段，目前只能找到创建者。

entry.title: Re: Where can i information on disaster recovery and high...
Re: Where can i information on disaster recovery and high...
entry.content: Hi jayantvikram, What I can share with you is note 3396152 - FAQs about backup and recovery service for S/4HANA Public Cloud Customers https://me.sap.com/notes/3396152/E where you can find fundamental information. And there is a PDF attached in the note showing DISASTER RECOVERY details. Furthermore I would recommend that a service incident should be created in case you need additional queries. Br,Bob

entry.title: Re: How an issue in Calendar ui.integration.cards turned out to be a feature. Kind of
entry.content:
Hi Alex, 

Nice article, definitely encouraging. In the UI integration card, if the non-working days have to be changed to Friday & Thursday is there any configuration to be in place?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: RV开票转账的时候，发出商品科目怎么可以对应到客户
entry.content:
Hi , 首先为什么需要使用发出商品的解决方案？是不是需要保证成本和收入配比，如果是，其实不需要使用发出商品的方案。

假设你现在使用的是S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition,现在使用scope item5MQ可以实现不用发出商品方案，保证成本和收入配比，而且在成本还原时差异自动结转，客户信息也会记录在凭证流里。可以参见博客里的‘’实际成本-发出商品差异结转‘’部分的信息。

Br,Bob

entry.title: While creating PR -ME51N getting Error Virus Scan Profile is not active
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is an error coming while manual creation of PR in ME51N.

when user enters all the line items details manually .and when user enters Purchase Org and Acct assignment data , and press Enter , Warning is coming "Virus Scan Profile /SOAP_CORE/WS_RECEIVE is not active".

and it is suppressing error messages coming from ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST~PROCESS_ITEM. and this is happening only when we enter Purch Org Data.

Can anyone help on this?

Thanks,

Arpita

entry.title: How to copy data automatically when work status changes to approved?
entry.content:
I have setup work status dimensions like Project, Project Type, Version, Scenario, Calculation. I want when I change the status to approved, I will consider the latest approval value of the data of the dimensions that will be copied into the final scenario.

Project: 1000 to 1000
Project Type: PL to PL
Version: V1 to V1
Calculation : SC to SC
Scenario : S001 to Final

Please help me.

Thank yo

work status, script logic, data manager,

entry.title: SAP CPQ 2405 版本的亮点新功能：(A)VC之上的产品配置规则
entry.content:
在本篇博客中，我们会讨论SAP CPQ 2405 的一项新功能：在SAP ERP (A)VC的场景下，在SAP CPQ 内部添加产品配置规则。首先，让我们简明扼要地了解一下使用到的术语。

术语缩写定义

SAP CPQ

"SAP Configure Price Quote"，是SAP ERP云产品系列中的一款专注可配置解决方案的销售报价工具云服务，其既可独立于其它SAP家族产品运作，亦可结合SAP Cloud Integration、SAP Master Data Integration、SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing、SAP Subscription Billing等服务与SAP S/4HANA（包括云与本地部署版本）高度集成。

SAP VCP

"SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing"，亦有简称"CPS"，是SAP业务技术云平台（Business Technology Platform，aka BTP）上的一个微服务，与SAP ERP（包括部分ECC版本、及所有S/4HANA云及本地部署版本）高度集成，面向前端应用平台提供开箱即用的云服务接口，消费SAP ERP (A)VC及销售定价的功能。

SAP (A)VC

"SAP (Advanced) Variant Configuration"，即“SAP变式配置”或“SAP高级变式配置”。

 

新功能简介

在千呼万唤中，SAP CPQ 2405正式官宣支持集成SAP ERP (A)VC的场景下，于CPQ内对集成同步的(A)VC产品补充产品配置规则。此前SAP CPQ已全面支持于CPQ内创建营销/销售BoM，组合来自SAP ERP的简单产品、(A)VC产品，以及CPQ内的简单产品和可配置产品，从而支持了深度使用SAP ERP (A)VC的企业拆分管理产研BoM与营销/销售BoM，既高度耦合，又相对独立。本次更新后，此种管理模式将得到系统工具层面的进一步升华，企业营销/销售部门可在SAP CPQ内通过简单易用的功能对(A)VC产品构建销售策略指导下的配置规则，这些规则基于ERP中(A)VC的底座，又能在不影响产研的情况下，丰富营销的规则。
新功能同时适用 Quote 1.0 和 Quote 2.0 引擎版本，具体如下。

 

新功能详解

IronPython 脚本方式

基于 OnProductReady 脚本事件

可在用户打开产品配置器时，执行一次性的初始化配置逻辑，应用场景包括但不限于按业务规则做初始选配。

低代码公式（Formula）方式

可见性限制（Visibility Restrictions）

支持对每次VCP配置接口交互后，进一步隐藏部分属性或属性值。其中规则条件支持公式标签动态获取变量，动作结果目前仅支持建模师手动选择指定的属性或属性名。

产品配置消息（Product Messages）

支持在VCP配置接口交互及CPQ配置引擎流程的终点，显示一条产品配置消息，并在满足规则条件的情况下，将产品配置标识为不完整（Incomplete）。消息内容中若强行植入产品配置操作标签，系统将跳过这些标签的解析。

 

效果示例

在CPQ管理员Setup界面中，打开目标(A)VC产品的某一KB对应的产品版本详情页面，在Definition页签可看到Configuration Type为"Variant"。通过此选项，CPQ将在用户于配置器中操作时，与SAP VCP服务进行集成交互，获得产品的配置规则校验结果，并呈现于CPQ配置器UI。

当产品的Configuration Type为"Variant"时，页签Rules and Messages中将仅剩"Visibility Restrictions"和"Product Messages"两类产品规则，页签Scripts中挂靠的脚本也仅剩"When product is ready"事件可供选择。

"Product Messages"和产品事件脚本的建模操作与非(A)VC产品无异。"Visibility Restrictions"为本次更新的全新建模子功能。点击"Add Restrictions"后，产品建模师可在画面中维护限制规则的名称、描述、执行顺序、规则条件、操作对象类型、及限制对象值。其中规则条件支持使用公式标签处理动态的变量取值与逻辑运算，操作对象类型支持属性或属性值，限制对象值支持多值选择。

当销售用户在产品配置器页面操作时，上述规则将被实时解析执行。打开Developer Console，可观察到系统执行规则解析与校验的顺序为：VCP配置接口集成交互->VCP价格接口集成交互->基于VCP配置接口结果调整CPQ配置结果->执行CPQ的配置规则。

 

展望

在SAP ERP (A)VC集成的场景下，SAP CPQ用户一直希望在系统内创建与营销和销售相关的产品信息。随着SAP CPQ 2405版本的发布，这个诉求已经得到了支持，预计相关功能会在以后得到进一步的完善和优化。
如果您有更好的想法或需求，我们欢迎您使用公司的SAP统一账号在SAP CPQ (Configure Price Quote) - Customer Influence (sap.com)提出您的建议。同时，您还可以查看其他SAP CPQ用户的想法，通过投票支持他们，甚至与他们或SAP CPQ的产品经理进行交流。

entry.title: Requirement to use signature algorithm XAdES-T
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to sign an XML file using XAdES-T (XML Advanced Electronic Signature with Time-Stamp) in ABAP as I found, sap doesn't support XAdES-T.  If can, kindly help on how to do this, since this is my first time to do digital signature. Kindly advise.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: User Account Control
entry.content:
As @SonTran has mentioned, if you turned UAC completely off this prompt would definitely go away.  So likely you have not done this properly or there is some group policy higher level that is keeping it on.

  1. Click "Start"
  2. Start typing "Control Panel" and click it
  3. Click "User Accounts
  4. Click "Change User Account Control settings"
  5. Drop the bar down to "Never notify"
  6. Click "OK"
  7. Restart your workstation

If this does not stick then you need higher level permissions or you need for your user to be setup as "Local Administrator".

To set your user as a local admin here are some steps:

https://docs.rackspace.com/docs/add-a-user-to-the-local-administrators-group-in-windows-server-2012

If neither of these work you could let SAP run as a user and not as an administrator.

  1. Click "Start"
  2. Type "SAP Business One" to bring up the icon
  3. Right-click the start menu icon and select "Open file location"
  4. Find the shortcut and right-click >> Properties
  5. Under the "Compatibility" tab make sure you uncheck the "Run as administrator" checkbox
  6. Click "OK"

If none of this works it's still UAC but you just need an IT person to help you with the user profile.  That message is 100% related to UAC settings whether they are local to the user or inherited by the domain.

Good luck!

entry.title: Grass Referral Code: dxxPHABope2TOf4

entry.title: Prtial payment
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

While doing partial payment in F-53 my payment terms are changing.

for example- while doing payment in F-53 the payment term in the document is 006 however after doing the payment the payment term is showing 004.

 

please advise.

entry.title: Re: Prtial payment
entry.content:
Hi @AK6 

Please check the tolerance group assigned to vendor/customer and check the configuration of the tolerance group in T Code OBA3. If you are creating residual items through manual clearing, it is possible, that the payment term is copied from what has been set up in the tolerance group.

If this is not the case, than the partial payment may pick up the default payment term assigned in the customer/vendor master in case of partial payment

Thanks & Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: crystal report output is coming differently from SAPB...
entry.content:
Same rpt is coming with different data from different RDB client system.

For example from my RDB client system qty is coming 14 but from another RDB client  system in the same rpt output qty is 27 and alignment also coming wrong.

entry.title: Re: Get to know what’s new for SAP SuccessFactors Learning with 1H2024 release
entry.content:
Hi, I refer to the Important Learning section and the comment "If allowed by the administrator, they can easily remove these assignments from their list, for example if they find that these are not currently relevant for them due to a change in their role, or because they already took a very similar training recently."

I am wondering if there's a way to toggle the ability for users to remove optional assignments to all items? With this update, this section will be very clogged for users as we have hundreds of items so there may be many they have not attended and now can't remove and clean up the important learning section due to this addition.  At the moment we would have to go in to each item and change the toggle which is not really possible.

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: vendor with multiple purchaze nature

Hi @MAZIZ 

The below blog post might be of help:

How to Change Reconciliation Account in MIRO,MIR7,... - SAP Community

Alternatively, other way is to have seperate subledger accounts for Materials and Services, even though the party is the same.

Thanks & Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: Prtial payment

So do i need to make some changes in the configuration to overcome this solution.

entry.title: How to call Hana stored procedure from cap java
entry.content:
I am new to cap java. I have built a cap java application, by referring to available samples and documentation.

I want to know how to call Hana stored procedure from cap java. The documentation for the same is available in cap nodejs but not for java.

Any help is appreciated. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Line loop on Grid excluding first four lines
entry.content:
Oh baby baby this is right in my wheelhouse.  A B1UP grid loop of an SQL Report UF??

I have done something very similar, not identical but my code will hopefully give you a couple of good ideas on how to troubleshoot your UF.

The point of my code is to create a "bill of lading" document by linking several sales orders through the "Referenced Document" system.  Then I use this to do a grouped printout later in Crystal.

I run the first part off of a Sales Order from a function button into an SQL Report Universal Function like this (pretty standard HANA SQL):

SELECT
     'N' AS "Link"
    ,T0."DocEntry"
    ,$[ORDR.DocEntry] AS "BaseDocEntry"
    ,CASE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RDR21 S0 WHERE S0."DocEntry" = $[ORDR.DocEntry]) WHEN 0 THEN 'True' ELSE 'False' END AS "FirstRow"
    ,T0."DocNum"
    ,CASE T0."DocStatus" WHEN 'O' THEN 'Open' ELSE 'Closed' END AS "Status"
    ,T0."NumAtCard"
    ,T0."DocDate"
    ,T0."DocDueDate"
    ,CASE WHEN T1."DocEntry" IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS "Linked"
    ,T0."ShipToCode"
    ,T0."Address2"
    ,X."ItemCode"
    ,X."ItemName"
    ,X."Quantity"

FROM
    ORDR T0
    LEFT JOIN RDR21 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."RefDocEntr" AND T1."DocEntry" = $[ORDR.DocEntry] AND T0."ObjType" = T1."ObjectType" AND T0."ObjType" = T1."RefObjType" AND T1."Remark" = 'Shipping Link'

    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT
             D0."DocEntry"
            ,D0."ItemCode"
            ,D0."Dscription" AS "ItemName"
            ,D0."Quantity"
       FROM RDR1 D0
       WHERE D0."VisOrder" = 0
    ) X ON T0."DocEntry" = X."DocEntry"

WHERE 
    T0."CardCode" = $[$4.0.0]
    AND
    T0."ShipToCode" = $[$40.0.0]
    AND
    T0."DocNum" > $[$8.0.0]
    AND
    (T0."DocStatus" = 'O' OR T1."DocEntry" IS NOT NULL)

ORDER BY T0."DocNum"

The code indicates other sales orders going to the same address and shows if they are already linked through the "Referenced Document" system or not.

Then there is a checkbox in the first column which I use as an indicator for the Dynamic Syntax to pick up later.

I used the Item Placement Tool to make a button called "Link Shipments" and then a B1 Validation to run this dynamic syntax which loops the SQL Report grid, looks for shipments that have a checkbox and that are not already linked (this is C#):

// Variables
string docLink,isLinked,DocEntry,DocNum,BaseDocEntry,cMessErr;
int nResult;
bool FirstRow;

// Assuming you have a grid object named "oGrid" in your SAP Business One form
Grid oGrid = (Grid)application.Forms.ActiveForm.Items.Item("BOY_1").Specific;

// Get the number of rows in the grid
int rowCount = oGrid.Rows.Count;

BaseDocEntry = oGrid.DataTable.GetValue("BaseDocEntry", 0).ToString();
FirstRow = Convert.ToBoolean(oGrid.DataTable.GetValue("FirstRow", 0).ToString());
SAPbobsCOM.Documents oOrder = (SAPbobsCOM.Documents)company.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.oOrders);
oOrder.GetByKey(Convert.ToInt32(BaseDocEntry));

// Loop through each row in the grid
for (int i = 0; i < rowCount; i++)
{

    // Get the value in a specific column and row
    docLink = oGrid.DataTable.GetValue("Link", i).ToString();
    isLinked = oGrid.DataTable.GetValue("Linked", i).ToString();

    if ( docLink == "Y" & isLinked == "N" ) {

        DocEntry = oGrid.DataTable.GetValue("DocEntry", i).ToString();
        DocNum = oGrid.DataTable.GetValue("DocNum", i).ToString();

        if ( FirstRow == false ) {

            oOrder.DocumentReferences.Add();

        }

        application.StatusBar.SetText("Linking Row " + (i+1) + ": " + DocNum, BoMessageTime.bmt_Medium, BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Warning);

        oOrder.DocumentReferences.ReferencedObjectType = SAPbobsCOM.ReferencedObjectTypeEnum.rot_SalesOrder; 
        oOrder.DocumentReferences.ReferencedDocEntry = Convert.ToInt32(DocEntry);
        oOrder.DocumentReferences.Remark = "Shipping Link";

        FirstRow = false;

    }

}

nResult = oOrder.Update(); // returns error number during operation 0 is no error

if (nResult != 0)  {
    company.GetLastError(out nResult, out cMessErr);
    throw new Exception(cMessErr);
}

form.Items.Item("BOY_6").Click(); // Click Refresh button

application.StatusBar.SetText("Documents finished linking. (UF-024)", BoMessageTime.bmt_Medium, BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Success);

As @Johan_H mentioned, an issue perhaps how you are doing it is the object already has a single line when you create it.  SO, if you declare the object, then define your properties and you add a row you technically do not need to do this, it will cause issues.  Not errors but it will usually just not work.  So you can see I start the code off with a "FirstRow" variable as "True" so I can avoid doing the add if it's the first row.  I had the same issue with my code, it would do every row except the first one properly until I did this.  I experimented, broke down the grid loop and then figured out that I didn't need to do the Add() off the first row.  Because there is already a row...

The second thing is that you should be wary of the TRY / CATCH stuff off the bat.  I use it but in your case you know your process is roughly correct.  You want to use the method I'm using for a better result (don't forget to define the variables):

nResult = oOrder.Update(); // returns error number during operation 0 is no error

if (nResult != 0)  {
    company.GetLastError(out nResult, out cMessErr);
    throw new Exception(cMessErr);
}

This gives you a clearer indication of what's wrong from my experience.

What I normally do to troubleshoot these type of builds is I just write out the steps I'm going to use manually without the loop.  So I would go like define the object, then pull the first row data into the properties then I would add then I would pull the second row into a new object and add, etc.  This way I know that I have a basic two / three row working step by step.  Then I work back to using the for() statements to recreate the same shape of the steps I need to do.  This is what got me working with the FirstRow Boolean process.  When I did the rows manually it didn't work, I was doing the add and it was just not doing it.  When I got rid of the add in my steps for the first row then it clicked into place and when I added the for() steps with the FirstRow it totally worked.

You can also break down each step and add MessageBox UI elements and StatusBar stuff too so you can see at each step if the data is going in the right place.

I plan on doing some videos on the B1UP Dynamic Syntax UF stuff.  I have a lot of examples now that I can share.

I hope this can help you, give it a try and if you are still stuck try and post your SQL Report code too, then I can have the full example to help troubleshoot.

Good luck!

Mike

entry.title: scheduling agreement - Output issue
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I need your support to understand and solve an issue related to Scheduling agreement, suddenly, the SA release copy was received by another user. However, no one updated the order from the planning side, yet the order was still received.

SA release copy email should be received by user who creates/modifies it.

Could you please guide how to solve this issue?

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: Can someone explain the differences between Match type?
entry.content: Hi, please check step 5.b on help page: Define Matching Methods.

entry.title: Is there any data source related to outbound delivery request details in ByD system?
entry.content:
In Business ByDesign, is there any standard data source related to outbound delivery request details?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is there any data source related to outbound delivery...
entry.content:
Currently there is no standard data source related to outbound delivery request.

We recommend you to post your query in SAP Business ByDesign Customer Influence Forum https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/886 so that our development can look into it. Please note you may search it firstly and if it is not found, please register your requirement for this new feature.

Other customers can then vote for it, which will assert its legitimacy as a standard feature by showing the industry need and in turn influence the implementation schedule of the requirement.

Alternatively, you can try to create custom data source to fulfill your requirement.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One , Android Mobile application is not...
entry.content:
Hi nikunjmehta2290

For connection failed error, please check section 7 of SAP note 1924930.
Also verify the connection between the mobile device and the B1i server. See SAP Note 1776825 for instructions.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Install ERP component on PPM system
entry.content:
Hi 

Kindly refer to the SAP Note 2395243 along with the attachment PDF with the version supported on your ERP system.

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Employee history Importing custom field issue
entry.content: Hi Ritanshi, Generally, History processor will fetch custom field data without any issues. Problem might come when you use picklist values where you need to map with picklist for the History field to display the name. Is it possible to check the issue through screen share?

entry.title: How to transfer data from HANADB to snowflake using Data Intellegence?
entry.content:
Hi!

I want to transfer data from s4hanadb(for example ACDOCA table) to snowflake using data intellegence, and i've successfully get data from hana db using read hana table operator.

But i don't know how to transfer the data to snowflake. I tried to use the cloud table producer,but i got nothing at mapping field. 

Really prefer to get some help on how to do this without using the cds view.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Consume Calculation View in SAC from CAP project not working
entry.content: I can't spot anything wrong from the information you shared. Maybe double check the connection in SAC that it is pointing to the correct HDI container and using a valid RT user?

entry.title: Re: How to open the MM closed period, when Material Ledge...
entry.content: "Thank you for your response. However, my question pertains to the closure of my March 2024, MM period and the need to reopen it. Currently, I am in the May 2024 period. The system is not allowing me to reopen the March period. Please suggest a solution. It is crucial as my March material ledger activities are pending, and I need to perform the April 2024 material ledger activities thereafter.

entry.title: Re: Career Prospect for NonSAP Integration Developer In SAP
entry.content:
Good Day @ag3silaus,

Thank you so much for your response. 

I will follow your suggestion for my learning of platform. 

Best Regards,

Hira

entry.title: Re: clipboard error while excel data uploading in sap
entry.content:
Hi,

I've figured out an alternate solution to disable/avoid clipboard alert, please follow the below-mentioned steps:  

 

ActiveClipboard (ACB): An Office feature that allows for storing of previous copies to paste later different prior copies. This feature is generally only available if Clipboard task pane is displayed to a user. You can disable the feature that causes the most issues by disabling automatic collection.

Disable Auto Collection using the registry:

HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Microsoft\Office\16.0\Common\General\
(REG_DWORD): AcbControl
VALUE: (enter as hexadecimal) 80000000

Note: Before setting AcbControl, all Office applications (including Outlook etc.) must be closed, no running instances in the task manager. Otherwise, when those apps close, they will write the key back to what it was when those apps launched.

-Adarsh Chougale

entry.title: Re: Could you please let me know the asset accounting Acq...
entry.content: Please help me with detailed

entry.title: Re: API call to connect DMS with SharePoint
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

The first part of the development I have achieved, so elaborating here

We need to create a custom entry in SM30 for table SGOSATTR

Once done the custom entry would start appearing in application toolbar

Please Note: We need to create a Z class by Inheriting standard class CL_GOS_SERVICE and redefine execute and check status method.

Now for second part which is to attach document to SAP from SharePoint and vice versa I am exploring, if someone has any reference how this part can be achieved kindly reply

entry.title: Re: Connecting to an SAP Analytics Cloud tenant to SAP Da...
entry.content:
Hi Rebeca, can you please cross check the SAC UUID you are entering? Error seems to denote that might be an issue. Another thing I want to highlight is that when it will authenticate, it will open up a new window where it will ask for credentials. Its not automatically the user who is logged into Datasphere rather the one you enter credentials for when you open link in the private window. 

Here is a blog and video on all the steps: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/user-context-for-metadata-extraction-to-sap-datasphere-catalog/ba-p/13571886

If issue still persists, please open an incident. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Career Prospect for NonSAP Integration Developer In SAP
entry.content:
There are good career prospects for Non-SAP Integration Developers in SAP. These specialists are in demand as companies increasingly integrate SAP with various external systems.

Here's a quick breakdown:

Demand: Companies need Non-SAP integration to connect SAP with external applications.
Skills: Focus on non-SAP technologies and integration tools like SAP BTP Integration Suite. Basic understanding of ABAP can be helpful.

entry.title: BP Transaction : Collection contact person is not getting created
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am creating contact person in BP transaction through BAPI with the below parameters.

 call function 'BAPI_BUPR_CONTP_CREATE'
      exporting
        businesspartner     = lv_kunnr
        contactperson       = rv_partner
        defaultrelationship = ' '
      tables
        addressduplicates   = lt_addressduplicates
        return              = lt_bapiret2_tab.

 

It's creating the contact person successfully which I can see under "Has contact person tab"(Please refer the attached screenshot)

But When I checked "Has collection contact person" I can see there is no entry there as expectation is to create collection contact person details as well.

I have already tried with the above BAPI with some additional parameters but no success yet.

I also tried with a new BAPI with the below parameters but even after success message. Collection contact person is not getting created.

data : lt_result            type table of bapiret2.
  call function 'BUPR_RELATIONSHIP_CREATE'
    exporting
      iv_partner_1    = lv_kunnr
      iv_partner_2    = rv_partner
      iv_relationship = 'UDM001'
      iv_x_save       = space
    tables
      et_return       = lt_result.
*  endif..

Please let me know if you have come through this scenario or have any information about this topic.

 

Regards,

Om
